headline: Array completes sale of select spectrum assets to Verizon for $1.0 billion
summary: Array Digital Infrastructure, Inc. (NYSE: AD) (ArraySM) today announced the successful closing of the previously announced agreement with Verizon (NYSE: VZ) to sell a portion of the Company's retained spectrum licenses for total consideration of $1.0 billion.

headline: AT&T Stock: Is T Underperforming the Communication Sector?
summary: While AT&T has lagged behind the broader communication sector over the past year, analysts remain somewhat upbeat about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Assessing Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Recent Pullback And Mixed Earnings Signals
summary: Why Verizon Communications (VZ) is on investors’ radar today Verizon Communications (VZ) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing gains over the past year but declines over the past month and past 3 months.
